mechanism: Character is treated as a fixed essence rather than a patterned process
Virtue language becomes image management rather than accountable conduct
possible_dampener: Require evidence repair and affected-person testimony

mechanism: People assume values will survive pressure without practice
possible_dampener: Use rehearsed commitments and failure-point reflection

mechanism: Moral identity protects self-image from correction
possible_dampener: Build humility apology and feedback practices

mechanism: Apology or regret fails to become restitution or changed conduct
possible_dampener: Define repair obligations and follow-through measures
Align incentives with truth care justice and accountability

mechanism: Contextual pressure is ignored when judging character
possible_dampener: Map roles incentives authority and constraints

mechanism: Claimed virtue becomes superiority or exclusion
possible_dampener: Test virtue through outgroup concern and power awareness

mechanism: Responsibility disappears into process or hierarchy
possible_dampener: Use role mapping consequence tracking and escalation channels
